title: gentiana scabra var. stenophylla
intro: Gentiana scabra var. stenophylla, also known as the narrow-leaf gentian or Japanese gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family, native to Japan and parts of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Gentiana scabra var. stenophylla include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. Gentiana scabra var. stenophylla can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
